consensus.overall_description: A plain dusty mauve crewneck t-shirt from SkyyRose in size Medium, featuring a black woven neck label with gold script branding and a small woven tag on the right sleeve. Clean, minimalist design with no front graphics.
patches: Small black square patch with a gold monogram on the right sleeve.
consensus.stitching_details: clean topstitching visible at sleeve hems and bottom hem, shoulder seams appear standard set-in construction

values.claude: A plain dusty mauve crewneck t-shirt from SkyyRose in size Medium, featuring a black woven neck label with gold script branding and a small woven tag on the right sleeve. Clean, minimalist design with no front graphics.
values.gemini: A solid mauve short-sleeve t-shirt with a classic crewneck collar. It features a woven brand label inside the neck and a small black and gold logo patch on the right sleeve.

gemini: Small black square patch with a gold monogram on the right sleeve.
